title: GLUTATHIONE
description: Glutathione is the body's master antioxidant, crucial for detoxification, immune function, and cellular protection. It's composed of three amino acids: cysteine, glycine, and glutamic acid. Supplementation supports liver health, skin brightening, and overall wellness.

research.title: An Update on Glutathione's Biosynthesis, Metabolism, Functions, and Medicinal Purposes
research.summary: Examines glutathione's role in maintaining redox balance, reducing oxidative stress, and enhancing metabolic detoxification for treating age-related disorders.

research.title: Glutathione in the Brain
research.summary: Explores neuronal GSH production regulation by EAAC1 as a potential therapeutic target for neurodegenerative diseases including Alzheimer's and Parkinson's.

research.title: Glutathione-Related Enzymes and Proteins: A Review
research.summary: Analyzes glutathione's function in regulating cellular processes and redox reactions, emphasizing transport systems' roles in disease and aging.

research.title: Glutathione metabolism and its implications for health
research.summary: Discusses glutathione's essential roles in antioxidant defense and nutrient metabolism, with deficiency linked to oxidative stress and various diseases.

research.title: Glutathione and its role in cellular functions
research.summary: Investigates GSH's participation in cellular redox reactions and thioether formation, with emphasis on liver origins and disease implications.

research.title: Glutathione in Brain Disorders and Aging
research.summary: Addresses glutathione's importance in brain health and aging, linking impairment to neuron loss in Huntington's, Parkinson's, and Alzheimer's diseases.

research.title: Glutathione and mitochondria
research.summary: Evaluates glutathione's protective functions against ROS, detoxification capacity, and cell death regulation in cancer and Alzheimer's.

sentiment.summary: Users report improved skin clarity, increased energy, and better recovery. Delivery method significantly impacts effectiveness - liposomal and IV forms preferred over standard oral.

effects.label: Delivery Matters:
effects.description: Standard oral poorly absorbed; use liposomal or IV.

effects.label: Consistent Use:
effects.description: Benefits build over weeks of supplementation.

dosage.label: IV:
dosage.description: 600-2000mg per session, weekly or as needed.

sideEffects.label: Generally Safe:
sideEffects.description: Few side effects at normal doses.

availability.label: Widely Available:
availability.description: Found in supplement stores and IV clinics.
